artStyle: wax crayon and soft pastel, warm children's-storybook
title: Milo's Small Spin

refrain.climaxMutation: Tiny steps, steady hearts, big spin.

beats.storyText: Milo loved to twirl in the playroom, one hand on his swishy skirt and ballet slippers bouncing on his shoulder.
beats.pageTurnHook: But the big recital circle looked much wider than home.
beats.illustrationBrief: Milo twirls in a cozy playroom, swishy practice skirt over leggings, ballet slippers slung over one shoulder, soft blocks and a rug around him.

beats.storyText: At dance class, a chalk circle waited on the floor, and every child was invited to spin inside it.
beats.pageTurnHook: Milo's toes stopped right at the white line.
beats.illustrationBrief: Milo stands at the edge of a chalk circle in a friendly dance studio, other small dancers nearby, his ballet slippers now in his hands.

beats.storyText: He whispered, Tiny step, steady spin, but wondered if a tiny step could ever cross such a big round space.
beats.pageTurnHook: Then the music began with a shy little plink.
beats.illustrationBrief: Milo looks thoughtful beside the chalk circle as warm music notes seem to float gently from a small speaker.

beats.storyText: Milo tapped one slipper down, then the other, and found a path of little steps curling like a ribbon.
beats.pageTurnHook: The ribbon path tangled when the tempo hopped faster.
beats.illustrationBrief: Milo follows a curling ribbon-like path of tiny dance steps inside the chalk circle, smiling with new courage.

beats.storyText: His skirt swished too far, his curls bounced into his eyes, and he sat down with one slipper half-tied.
beats.pageTurnHook: The circle felt quiet until a friend offered a hand.
beats.illustrationBrief: Milo sits gently on the dance floor inside the chalk circle, one slipper half-tied, a kind classmate reaching out.

beats.storyText: Milo took the hand and called, Tiny steps, steady hearts, big spin, and the class made one wide turning circle together.
beats.pageTurnHook: Milo's laugh spun right through the room.
beats.illustrationBrief: Milo dances hand-in-hand with classmates in a wide joyful circle, his swishy skirt and curls moving as everyone turns together.

beats.storyText: Back home, Milo drew a tiny chalk circle on the rug and practiced a spin big enough for tomorrow.
beats.pageTurnHook: This time, the circle waited like a friend.
beats.illustrationBrief: Milo practices happily in the cozy playroom inside a small chalk circle on the rug, ballet slippers nearby, evening light warm and calm.
